name: Split Pea Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine all of the ingredients.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat and cover with ajar. Simmer for 3 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove and discard the bay leaf.
5. Remove the ham hocks from the soup when cool enough to handle. Cut the meat into bite-size pieces.
6. Return the meat to the soup and heat through.
Yield: 6-8 servings.
